artPrompt: A goblin wizard in a tattered campaign sash conjuring a curl of flame in one upraised palm, eyes glinting with reckless glee amid the burning town square; firelight washes his grinning face in flame-orange, bonfires and drifting sparks dissolving into ember-red haze and night-black smoke behind him, the spell caught mid-flicker with a tender, dreamy softness, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Incumbent Pyromancer
text:
{T}: Incumbent Pyromancer deals 1 damage to any target.
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, untap Incumbent Pyromancer.
flavorText: Running on a platform of fire, more fire, and tax breaks for fire.
